prompt: A crane unloads containers onto AGV1 and AGV2. A drone supervises from above, and a forklift transports the containers to storage. Both AGVs wait until crane signals unloading complete. Forklift starts after any AGV reaches the transfer zone. Drone must maintain 20 m distance from crane at all times. Eventually, all containers must be in storage.
constraints: AGV1 and AGV2 wait until CraneBot signals unloading complete
Forklift starts only after at least one AGV reaches transfer zone
DroneSupervisor maintains at least 20 m distance from CraneBot
Eventually all containers reach storage area
